name: diagram-tour
description: Monorepo scaffold for guided tours over Mermaid diagrams.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/parser build && bun run --cwd packages/web-player build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.test: bun test ./scripts/dev-web-player-lib.test.ts && bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/parser test && bun run --cwd packages/web-player test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
scripts.smoke: bun run build && bun run --cwd packages/web-player smoke
scripts.install:cli: bun run --cwd packages/cli build && npm install -g ./packages/cli
scripts.prepush: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run smoke
